programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends enter the NGL. Meanwhile, the Chimera Ants have started going through surprising changes.

programme.title: Death Note: Silence
programme.desc: Light, his memory recovered, orders Misa to begin killing after Higuchi dies.

programme.title: Death Note: Renewal
programme.desc: Light has removed everyone in his way and is closer to achieving his perfect world.

programme.title: Death Note: Abduction
programme.desc: A new investigator steps forward, Near, a central figure in the SPK, an organization that is trying to catch Kira without relying on L.

programme.title: Death Note: Impatience
programme.desc: Light, acting as L, reveals to Near that his sister Sayu has been kidnapped by someone wanting to trade her for the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Father
programme.desc: Light tries to discover where Mello and his Mafia associates are hiding and uses Misa's eyes to find the Death Note's current owner.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 3
programme.desc: Thanks to Kakyoin, Joseph is able to figure out that DIO's Stand, "The World," has the power to stop time, but is quickly defeated by DIO. Jotaro then attacks The World with Star Platinum but is no match for DIO's power.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With help from Polnareff as well as putting his own life on the line, Jotaro is finally able to land a blow on DIO. Finding the shriveled body of Joseph Joestar, Jotaro becomes enraged and wages his final, desperate battle with DIO!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Jotaro Kujo! Meets Josuke Higashikata
programme.desc: In April 1999, Jotaro Kujo travels to a town in Japan called Morioh to find a young man named Josuke Higashikata, the secret love child of his grandfather, Joseph Joestar. Upon finding him, Jotaro is surprised to learn that Josuke also possesses a Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Josuke Higashikata! Meets Angelo
programme.desc: Josuke informs Jotaro about his encounter with Angelo’s Stand. Deducing that the serial killer’s Stand is capable of entering people’s bodies, Jotaro tells Josuke over the phone to stay on high alert until he arrives at his home.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Jotaro learn that a man with a bow and arrow was responsible for awakening Angelo’s Stand ability. Realizing the town is still in danger, they decide to find the bow and arrow before it can create any more victims.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the Nijimura Brothers’ house to rescue Koichi, who is in critical condition after getting shot by Keicho Nijimura’s bow and arrow. But when Josuke steps into the house, he is attacked by Keicho’s Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 3
programme.desc: After defeating Keicho, Koichi insists they find the bow and arrow and destroy it. Josuke agrees, but when the two enter the attic where the bow and arrow are being kept, they hear an inhuman noise inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Koichi Hirose (Reverb)
programme.desc: On his way to school, Koichi finds himself blackmailed by a man named Tamami Kobayashi, who frames him for running over a cat. A panicked Koichi starts to feel guilty for his actions when suddenly a giant lock appears on his chest!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Toshikazu Hazamada (Show Off)
programme.desc: Josuke and Koichi get info that a student at their school, Toshikazu Hazamada may be a Stand user and decide to look into the case. Their suspicions are quickly confirmed after Hazamada’s wooden doll morphs into an exact copy of Josuke and attacks them.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua decide to join Kite and his team in their research mission gathering information on the Chimera Ants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kite has narrowed down the location of the Chimera Ants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends enter the NGL. Meanwhile, the Chimera Ants have started going through surprising changes.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The situation worsens, and Gon and his friends receive Ponzu's message.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends come face-to-face with Chimera Ants for the first time and are frightened by their speed and power.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Chimera Ants become increasingly vicious after eating the members of the NGL underground.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Hunter Association sets out to eliminate the Chimera Ants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER: A x Fated x Awakening
programme.desc: Hagya attacks Gon, Killua and Kite. Meanwhile, the first of the Queen's Royal Guards is about to be born.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kite, Gon and Killua continue using Nen to follow Hagya to the Chimera Ant's nest.

programme.title: Undisputed, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: When the world's heavyweight champion is sent to prison, everything points to an inevitable showdown with the penitentiary's undefeated champ. But to make sure the meeting will happen, a former mob boss must call in favors from the outside world.

programme.title: Drop Zone, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes free-falls into the daredevil world of sky-diving to track down a cadre of techno terrorists in Drop Zone, a chute-to-thrill adventure co-starring Gary Busey, Yancy Butler, Michael Jeter and more.

programme.title: King of New York, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: The Outside Story, (0001, Comedy)
programme.desc: When Charles locks himself out of his building, he's forced to go horizontal and confront the world he's been avoiding in search of a way back inside.

programme.title: On The Count Of Three, (0001, Drama)
programme.desc: From Annapurna Pictures and Orion Pictures, Jerrod Carmichael makes his directorial debut and stars in a darkly comic feature about two best friends, Val (Carmichael) and Kevin (Christopher Abbott), on the last day of their lives.

programme.title: Moonlight, (2016, Drama)
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young Black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support, and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco, (2019, Drama)
programme.desc: Jimmie & his best friend Mont try to reclaim the home built by Jimmie's grandfather, launching them on a poignant odyssey that connects them to their past, even as it tests their friendship & sense of belonging in the place they call home.

programme.title: Zola, (2021, Thriller)
programme.desc: A waitress, strikes up a friendship with a customer, who seduces her to join a weekend in Florida. What seems like a glamorous trip transforms into a journey involving a pimp, a boyfriend, gangsters and adventures in this see-it-to-believe-it tale.

programme.title: Jinn, (2018, Drama)
programme.desc: Summer is a 17-year-old carefree black girl whose world is turned upside down when her mother, Jade, abruptly converts to Islam. Jade becomes a different person, prompting Summer to reevaluate her identity.

programme.title: Invincible Dragon, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure about the legendary hero Zhong Kui, a fabled warrior with mysterious powers who is forced to conquer the realms of Heaven and Hell to save his people.

programme.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Drive, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: When a prototype 'enhanced human' on the run from hit men hooks up with a dread-locked bystander, the two elude their pursuers. Starring Brittany Murphy ("8 Mile").

programme.title: Legacy Of Rage [English-Language Version], (0001, Action)
programme.desc: Brandon Ma is an average Joe, but his best friend, Michael, is a sinister drug dealer with a crush on Brandon's girlfriend, May. When Michael murders a dirty cop and frames his friend, sending him to jail, Brandon returns for vengeance.

programme.title: Return of the Chinese Boxer, (1977, Action)
programme.desc: In wake of the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), a group of Japanese warlords calculate the best way to prepare an invasion of the rest of China is from their southern Manchuria staging ground.

programme.title: Return Of The Tiger, (1978, Action)
programme.desc: Shrewd'n'suave Chang Wong and his female partner devise an elaborate plan to take out a heroin drug ring.

programme.title: Nine Venoms, (1983, Action)
programme.desc: After selling his soul to the devil, Joey is given the power to control 9 demons. With their help, Joey must save his childhood friend Gary from a bloody massacre.

programme.title: Enter The Panther, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A young kung fu master seeks vengeance upon the villains.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2, (2015, Comedy)
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy, and the Barden Bellas compete in the World Championships of A Cappella after a scandal threatens their legacy.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dewey Cox had it all: the women (over 411), the friends (Elvis) and the rock 'n' roll lifestyle (every pill and powder). But most of all, he had the music that transformed a dimwitted country boy into the greatest American rock star who never lived.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Screwball)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (0001, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (0001, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: A Night at the Roxbury, (1998, Screwball)
programme.desc: It seems like Steve and Doug will never be cool enough to make the Roxbury club’s guest list. Until they have a fender bender with their role model, club regular Richard Grieco. Eager to avoid litigation, Grieco befriends the starstruck pair.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure, (1989, Screwball)
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Runaway Bride, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays a small-town girl whose marches down the aisle become a series of near Mrs. when she bolts before saying "I do."

programme.title: Autumn In New York, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: Autumn in New York follows the sexual exploits of Will Keane (RICHARD GERE) until he runs into an unexpected dead end when he meets Charlotte Fielding (WINONA RYDER). Charlotte is half Will's age and twice his match.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance, (2001, Drama)
programme.desc: Sara is a small-town girl who dreams to become a world-class ballerina. But when her mother suddenly dies, she must abandon her plans and join her estranged father on Chicago's South Side.

programme.title: Best Men, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore, Luke Wilson and Sean Patrick Flannery star in this hilarious action-comedy wherein Drew Barrymore is a young woman determined to have the perfect wedding day, despite the fact that the groomsmen have decided to rob the local bank.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: A mother falls for a younger man while her daughter falls in love for the first time. Mother Nature messes with their fates.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: A Guy Thing, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Paul (Jason Lee) is a good guy. When his friends throw him a wild bachelor party, he's shocked when he wakes up in bed with a beautiful girl named Becky (Julia Stiles) and can't remember the night before. She also happens to be his fiancée's cousin.

programme.title: The Firm, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Runaway Jury, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: A jury fixer plays a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a jury member and a mysterious outsider who both offer to 'deliver' the verdict to the highest bidder. Soon, lives and millions of dollars are at stake in this pulse-pounder filled with twists and turns.

programme.title: The Grey, (2012, Thriller)
programme.desc: After a plane crash leaves him stranded in the Alaskan wilderness, a sharpshooter (Liam Neeson) tries to lead fellow survivors to safety despite forbidding conditions and a pack of ferocious wolves.

programme.title: Hannibal, (0001, Horror)
programme.desc: Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) comes out of hiding to draw FBI Agent Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore) into a high-stakes battle that tests her strength, cunning...and loyalty. Gary Oldman, Ray Liotta and Giancarlo Giannini also star.

programme.title: Donnie Darko (Theatrical Cut), (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man, (2014, Thriller)
programme.desc: Phillip Seymour Hoffman stars in this action-thriller from spymaster John Le Carre. German and U.S. intelligence agencies race to uncover the identity of a mysterious man.

programme.title: Limitless, (2011, Thriller)
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Boyhood, (2014, Drama)
programme.desc: Filmed over twelve years with the same cast, Richard Linklater's acclaimed smash hit is a groundbreaking celebration of life. Stars Ethan Hawke and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: Rocky Marciano, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: The life of boxer Rocky Marciano, the only undefeated heavyweight champion.

programme.title: Half Nelson, (0001, Drama)
programme.desc: A powerful, award-winning film about an inner-city junior high school teacher with a drug habit who forms an unlikely friendship with one of his students after she discovers his secret.

programme.title: Almost Famous, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Forrest Gump, (1994, Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Posse, (1993, Western)
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: Billy the Kid, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter kills a member of an outlaw gang, all Hell breaks loose in this shoot-‘em-up tale of gun smoke and justice in the Old West.

programme.title: Jericho, (2000, Western)
programme.desc: Amnesiac gunman Jericho is rescued and befriended by a charismatic and itinerant cowboy/preacher named Joshua. Together they survive certain danger, while Jericho searches to find the answer to his lost identity.

programme.title: End of the Rope, (2024, Western)
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Sheriff Jacobson and Attorney Taylor investigate the disappearance of the Haven Family while facing a town bent on vengeance against suspect Charles Bannon.

programme.title: The Conspirator, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: From director Robert Redford comes the riveting true story behind the assassination trial of Abraham Lincoln – including the lone woman who was accused of plotting his murder.

programme.title: Damsel, (2018, Western)
programme.desc: A businessman travels West to join his fiancée in the mountains.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: The world needed a hero; we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz, and James Marsden star in the adventure that the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves, (2023, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark, (1981, Action)
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom, (0001, Action)
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark, (1981, Action)
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom, (1984, Action)
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Encino Man, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Tears of the Sun, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top-secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary.

programme.title: Boyhood, (0001, Drama)
programme.desc: Filmed over twelve years with the same cast, Richard Linklater's acclaimed smash hit is a groundbreaking celebration of life. Stars Ethan Hawke and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: The Bling Ring, (0001, Drama)
programme.desc: A teenager and his gang of fame-obsessed youths use the Internet to track the whereabouts of celebrities, then rob their homes.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide, (2003, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate a murder while pursuing their other full-time professions. Welcome to Hollywood Homicide - the only place where you can come to work hungry, horny, thirsty, and broke, and resolve all four by the end of the watch.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Inland Empire, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish and surreal.

programme.title: Party Girl, (1995, Drama)
programme.desc: In this raucous comedy, Parker Posey ("Scream 3") stars as a hard-partying NY club girl who takes a job as a librarian.

programme.title: Heathers, (0001, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Popeye, (1980, Comedy)

programme.title: Erik the Viking, (1989, Comedy)

programme.title: Cutthroat Island, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer, (2017, Thriller)

programme.title: Succubus, (2024, Horror)
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Mandy, (0001, Action)
programme.desc: When a cult attacks, the shocking assault leads to vengeance.

programme.title: The Legend of La Llorona, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: A malevolent spirit preys on a family in Mexico. As they fight to save their son from the vengeful entity, they uncover a secret from Carly's past that may hold the key to defeating La Llorona.

programme.title: Lords of Salem, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: From the singular mind of horror maestro Rob Zombie comes a nightmare world where evil forces from a Salem, Massachusetts legend unleash terror upon the modern-day town.

programme.title: Airplane II: The Sequel, (1982, Comedy)

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure, (1989, Screwball)
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Heathers, (1988, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: Blue Velvet, (1986, Thriller)
programme.desc: A sensual mystery thriller about strange happenings in a small North Carolina town. A college student stumbles across a bizarre mystery and wants to know more, perhaps too much more.

programme.title: American Gigolo, (1980, Thriller)
programme.desc: Julian Kay has it all: the Mercedes, the clothes, access to Beverly Hills' swankiest establishments, and a stable of rich, female clients. But it all falls apart after he does a favor for his former pimp and the trick turns up dead a short while later.

programme.title: Raging Bull, (2020, Drama)

programme.title: About Last Night, (1986, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Project Almanac, (2015, Adventure)

programme.title: The Godfather, (1972, Crime)

programme.title: The Godfather Part II, (1974, Crime)
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Seven Samurai, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.desc: Werner Herzog (Cave of Forgotten Dreams) crafts a compelling documentary look at wildlife preservationist Timothy Treadwell, who lived unarmed among grizzly bears in Alaska.

programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: A mysterious new threat arrives on the scene in New Domino City, forcing Yusei to take to the streets and track down a rogue Turbo Duelist known as The Ghost.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Before heading out to the event of the year - The World Racing Grand Prix Gala - Yusei challenges Jack to a Turbo Duel in the hopes of finding a new dueling strategy that doesn't involve the use of Synchro Monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Akiza goes to get her Turbo Dueling license, but before she can drive off into the sunset, she first has to out-duel, out-maneuver and out-smart one of Sector Security's finest for her final exam.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After a string of Duel Runner thefts has New Domino City on high alert, Jack Atlas decides to take justice into his own hands and ventures out in search of those responsible.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When a mysterious new student gives Luna a-one-of-a-kind Duel Board, Leo, trusting his instincts, steps up and tries to pull a 180 on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the Duel Board battle between Leo, Luna and the mystery duelist continues, Leo soon realizes that their mysterious opponent is actually an all-too-familiar friend.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack and Crow set out to find a restless Yusei - hoping to ease his mind and reinforce the friendship they share by Turbo Dueling down memory lane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: A mysterious amnesiac helps Yusei build a new engine program for his Runner, but before they can test it out, a make-up-wearing, noodle-eating crook runs off with the file.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and the gang trail Lazar to the local mall hoping to reacquire the engine design program that this window-shopping, noodle-eating crook stole from them.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and Lazar are trapped in a warehouse where their only chance of escaping is if Yusei can outduel a Guard Bot whose CPU has been uploaded with all of Yusei's battle techniques.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After being charged with crimes he didn't commit, Jack Atlas scrambles to uncover the truth before his friends and fans turn their back on him for good.
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part I

programme.title: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Surprising Outcome! White Chase vs. Vergo!

programme.title: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Caesar's Defeat! The Powerful Grizzly Magnum!

programme.title: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Critical Situation! Punk Hazard Explodes!

programme.title: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Touching Reunion! Momonosuke and Kin'emon!

programme.title: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: It's Time to Say Goodbye! Leaving Punk Hazard!

programme.title: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The G-5 Wiped Out! Doflamingo's Sudden Attack!

programme.title: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Caesar Goes Missing! The Pirate Alliance Makes a Sortie!

programme.title: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Dies at Sea?! The Pirate Alliance Comes Apart!

programme.title: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Explore! A Kingdom of Love and Passion - Dressrosa!

programme.title: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Full of Enthusiasm! The Corrida Colosseum!

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Dangerous Love! The Dancer Girl - Violet!

programme.title: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Formidable, Unknown Warrior! Here Comes Lucy!

programme.title: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fateful Reunion! Bellamy the Hyena!

programme.title: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Super Rookie! Bartolomeo the Cannibal!

programme.title: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big Names Duke It Out! The Heated Block B Battle!

programme.title: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Blow! The Astonishing King Punch!

programme.title: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fighting Fish Strike! Across the Deadly Iron Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unknown World! The Tontatta Kingdom!

programme.title: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Stratagem of the Century! Doflamingo Makes His Move!

programme.title: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking Heaven and Earth! Admiral Fujitora's Power!

programme.title: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Blow of Anger! A Giant vs. Lucy!

programme.title: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Destruction Cannon Blasts! Lucy in Trouble!

programme.title: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Pirate! Don Chin Jao!

programme.title: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Light and Shadow! Darkness behind Dressrosa!

programme.title: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Making a Sortie! The Legendary Hero Usoland!

programme.title: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fierce Battle Coming to the End! Lucy vs. Chin Jao!

programme.title: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy and the Gladiator of Fate - Rebecca!

programme.title: Men in Black II, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Agents Jay and Kay are re-teamed against a sinister seductress who represents the toughest challenge yet to the MIB.

programme.title: Men in Black³, (2012, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Agent Jay travels back in time to 1969, where he teams up with a younger version of Agent Kay to stop an evil alien from destroying the future.

programme.title: The 6th Day, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Mad Max, (0001, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Johnny Mnemonic, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves is a space-age courier who's plugged in, turned on and buffed up to deliver the most important data of the 21st century, wet-wired directly into his brain! A rapid-fire roller coaster of action and high-impact imagery! Rating: R

programme.title: The Matrix, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence. Every second becomes a fight to stay alive - to escape The Matrix.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: In the second chapter of the Matrix trilogy, Zion falls under siege to the Machine Army. Neo and Trinity choose to return to the Matrix with Morpheus. Now, Neo must follow the path he has chosen if he is to save humanity.

programme.title: The Toughest Gun In Tombstone, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: In lawless 1880s Arizona, an undercover captain infiltrates the West's most notorious outlaw gang. Building a ruthless reputation while hiding his true identity, he plays a deadly game of deception to bring down the brutal crew of killers.

programme.title: Gun The Man Down, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: When an outlaw is shot during a heist and left for dead by his partners - who take his money and his woman - he sets out to track them down. And when he catches up with them, he’ll have to rely on his wits...as much as the loaded gun in his holster!

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter, (1964, Western)
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Rovin' Tumbleweeds, (0001, Western)
programme.desc: Rancher Autry takes a job singing on the radio to aid farmers whose lands were destroyed by floods. Blaming crooked politicians, he goes to Washington and tries to put through a flood control bill.

programme.title: South of the Border, (1939, Western)
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Federal agents Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse journey to Mexico to help foil the plans of foreign spies attempting to gain control of Mexican oil fields.

programme.title: Rancho Grande, (0001, Western)
programme.desc: The owner of a highly mortgaged ranch, where Gene Autry is the foreman, dies, and leaves the ranch to his madcap grandchildren. Gene must help them save the ranch and use the cash to build a dam.

programme.title: Pardners, (1956, Comedy)
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches, (1981, Action)
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: The Iron Sheriff, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Sterling Hayden plays a sheriff with continuing moral dilemmas. Should he relate a deathbed confession which falsely implicates his son in a murder? Should he carry out his threat to cold-bloodedly kill the real murderer or bring him to legal justice?

programme.title: Terror In A Texas Town, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: A greedy financier and a gang of gunmen force people to sell land.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Seabiscuit, (2003, Drama)
programme.desc: The true story of the undersized Depression-era racehorse whose victories lifted not only the spirits of the team behind it but also those of the nation as well.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: Written and directed by Academy Award winner Sofia Coppola, Marie Antoinette is an electrifying yet intimate re-telling of the turbulent life of history's favorite villainess. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Vantage Point, (0001, Thriller)
programme.desc: During an historic counter-terrorism summit in Spain, the President of the United States is struck down by an assassin's bullet. Eight strangers have a perfect view of the kill, but what did they really see? Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Snatch, (2000, Thriller)
programme.desc: A diamond heist gone haywire launches gangsters, bookies, and a dog on a rollicking ride through the rugged world of bare-knuckle boxing in search of the missing stone. Critically acclaimed comedy from Guy Ritchie.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan, (2002, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The story of Marisa Ventura (Jennifer Lopez), a single mother born in the boroughs of New York City, who works as a maid in a first-class Manhattan hotel. By a twist of fate and mistaken identity, Marisa meets Christopher Marshall (Ralph Fiennes)

programme.title: Big Fish, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Throughout his life, Edward Bloom (Ewan McGregor) has always been a man of big appetites, enormous passions and tall tales.

programme.title: Seabiscuit, (2003, Drama)
programme.desc: The true story of the undersized Depression-era racehorse whose victories lifted not only the spirits of the team behind it but also those of the nation as well.

programme.title: A Perseguição, (2011)

Para o seu reality show sobre caça aos fantasmas, uma equipe de produção se tranca dentro de um hospital psiquiátrico abandonado que supostamente é assombrado – e pode ser que isso seja verdade demais. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Richard Harmon, Shawn C. Phillips, Jennica Fulton, Jeffrey Bowyer-Chapman Diretor: John Poliquin

programme.title: [REC] 4 - Apocalipse, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Os sobreviventes de uma estranha epidemia que transforma os humanos em demônios encontram-se a bordo de um navio, onde um médico tenta identificar a origem do surto. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Manuela Velasco, Ferran Terraza, Jorge-Yamam Serrano Diretor: Jaume Balagueró

programme.title: Imagens do Além, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Um casal descobre uma presença perturbadora nas fotos de um suposto acidente. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Joshua Jackson, Rachel Taylor, Megumi Okina Diretor: Masayuki Ochiai

programme.title: Megalodon, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Uma embarcação militar em busca de um submersível não identificado encontra-se cara a cara com um tubarão gigante, forçado a usar apenas o que tem a bordo para se defender da besta monstruosa. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Michael Madsen, Dominic Pace, Caroline Harris, Scott Roe Diretor: James Thomas

programme.title: REC, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um repórter de televisão e um cinegrafista seguem os trabalhadores de emergência até um prédio escuro e rapidamente se trancam com algo assustador. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Manuela Velasco, Ferran Terraza, Jorge-Yamam Serrano Diretor: Jaume Balagueró, Paco Plaza

programme.title: ECOS DO ALÉM 2, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Um soldado volta para casa do Iraque, assombrado pelos fantasmas daqueles que viu morrer. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Rob Lowe, Marnie McPhail, Ben Lewis Diretor: Ernie Barbarash

programme.title: A Casa dos 1000 Corpos, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. Este filme sangrento segue dois casais jovens em uma jornada para encontrar a verdade sobre um personagem mítico conhecido apenas como “Dr. Satanás”. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Sid Haig, Karen Black, Bill Moseley Diretor: Rob Zombie

programme.title: A Cura, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Um executivo é enviado para resgatar o CEO de sua empresa de um misterioso “centro de bem-estar”. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Dane Dehaan, Jason Isaacs, Mia Goth, Ivo Nandi, Dane DeHaan, Adrian Schiller, Tomas Norström, Celia Imrie, Harry Groener, Ashok Mandanna Diretor: Gore Verbinski

programme.title: Pacto com o Diabo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Em 1665, após a morte de seu marido, Grace Haverstock é injustamente acusada de bruxaria. Sob custódia do implacável inquisidor John Moorcroft, ela enfrenta torturas físicas e psicológicas enquanto luta para manter sua sanidade e provar sua inocência. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Charlotte Kirk, Sean Pertwee, Steven Waddington, Joe Anderson, Suzanne Magowan, Ian Whyte, Callum Goulden, Sarah Lambie, Leon Ockenden, Emma Campbell-... Diretor: Neil Marshall

programme.title: Pânico nas Alturas, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Cinco jovens, que querem celebrar o Ano Novo no topo de uma montanha, ficam presos em um teleférico quando uma terrível tempestade tem início. O que era para ser uma festa de aventura, logo se torna uma luta pela sobrevivência. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Irina Antonenko, Anastasiya Grachyova, Vladimir Gusev, Denis Kosyakov, Andrey Nazimov, Aleksandr Nikitchenko, Ingrid Olerinskaya, Angelina Pikovskaya, Viktoriya Pyatakina, Kseniya Shumeyko Diretor: Tigran Sahakyan (Director)

programme.title: [REC] 2, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Um médico e uma equipe da SWAT entram em um prédio em quarentena, onde um vírus transformou os moradores em uma horda de monstros vorazes. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Jonathan D. Mellor, Manuela Velasco, Óscar Zafra Diretor: Jaume Balagueró, Paco Plaza, Martin Samper

programme.title: O Chamado, (2002)
programme.desc: 2002. Uma mulher percebe que a criança a quem ela deu à luz é, na verdade, o filho de Satanás. Colocada na terra para manifestar o mal de seu pai, essa jovem aparentemente fofa é na verdade um vaso para a maior escuridão do mundo. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Laura Harris, Richard Lintern, Francis Magee Diretor: Richard Caesar

programme.desc: 2000. Matt Sorenson é um ex-boxeador que é também policial. Ele tenta elucidar a brutal morte de seu irmão mais novo, Michael, e para isto precisa se infiltrar em algo desconhecido para ele: a prática do sadomasoquismo. programme.title: Instinto Selvagem 2, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. A romancista Catherine está novamente em apuros com a lei e a Scotland Yard nomeia o psiquiatra Dr. Michael Glass para avaliá-la. No entanto, como o detetive Nick Curran antes dele, Glass fica fascinado por Tramell e é atraído para um jogo sedutor. programme.title: A Espiã, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Na Holanda ocupada pelos nazistas durante a Segunda Guerra Mundial, um cantor judeu se infiltra na sede regional da Gestapo para a resistência holandesa. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Thom Hoffman, Carice van Houten, Sebastian Koch Diretor: Paul Verhoeven

programme.title: Na Mira dos Assassinos, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Uma gangue de ladrões fugindo após roubar um banco corre para um acampamento familiar. Aproveitando a ocasião, os criminosos vão esconder o dinheiro roubado no carro enquanto descansam. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: James Caviezel, James Frain, Elisabeth Röhm Diretor: Antonio Negret

programme.title: Até o Fim!, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. O ex-soldado de Operações Especiais Jake Hunter está desesperado para encontrar sua filha desaparecida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Paul Sloan, Richard Dreyfuss, Jake Weber, Taryn Manning, Mike Hatton, Michael Madsen... Diretor: Christian Sesma

programme.title: Vingança Final, (2004)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Clive Owen, Jonathan Rhys Meyers, Charlotte Rampling, Malcolm McDowell, Jamie Foreman, Ken Stott, John Surman, Alexander Morton, Paul Mohan, Geoff Bel... programme.desc: 2020. Danny Gallagher, um desacreditado detetive da narcóticos recém saído da prisão, busca vingança da pessoa responsável pela a acusação que o levou a ser preso e que matou seu parceiro. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Karl Urban, Sofía Vergara, Andy Garcia Diretor: Bobby Moresco (as Robert Moresco)

programme.title: O Amante, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um homem que, após a morte da sua esposa, descobre que ela tinha um amante há vários anos, embarca numa viagem que o leva a Inglaterra, Alemanha e Itália para encontrar o amante da sua esposa e descobrir toda a verdade sobre aquela mulher. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Liam Neeson, Antonio Banderas, Laura Linney, Romola Garai, Abigail Canton, Pam Ferris, Paterson Joseph, Craig Parkinson, Lola Peploe, Sophie Wu Diretor: Richard Eyre

programme.title: O Esconderijo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Dave e a esposa Amy encontram uma casa perfeita. Tudo é lindo até que eles descobrem que os tijolos estão cheios de heroína. programme.desc: 2007. programme.title: Em Busca de um Milagre, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. O mundo do doutor Luke Matthew desaba quando ele perde o amor de sua vida e se torna pai na mesma noite. Quando ele contrata Sage como a nova babá, os dois começam a perceber que a melhor forma de remédio é deixar ir. programme.title: Eu Sempre te Amarei, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Riley e Chris, recém-formados no ensino médio e apaixonados, são separados por um trágico acidente de carro. Enquanto Riley se culpa pela morte de Chris, ele fica preso num limbo. Milagrosamente, os dois descobrem uma maneira de se comunicar. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Alexandra Shipp, Nicholas Hamilton, DeRon Horton, Famke Janssen, Ian Tracey, Catherine Lough Haggquist, Zoë Belkin, Eddie Ramos, Patrick Gilmore, Aaro... Diretor: Scott Speer

programme.title: Planeta dos Tubarões, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Em um futuro próximo, o derretimento glacial cobrirá 98% da massa terrestre. Tubarões floresceram e agora dominam o planeta, operando como uma enorme escola liderada por um tubarão alfa mutante. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Brandon Auret, Stephanie Beran Diretor: Mark Atkins

programme.title: Vulcão - O Apocalipse, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Quando um ex-comandante das Operações Especiais visita Pompéia, sua esposa e filha ficam presas no Monte. O Vesúvio entra em erupção com força maciça. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: John Rhys-Davies, Adrian Paul Diretor: Ben Demaree

programme.title: Pânico em Seattle, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Quando uma grande tempestade ameaça o noroeste do Pacífico, uma família deve se encontrar e trabalhar junta para acabar com a tempestade antes que ela se espalhe além de seu controle e aniquile o planeta! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Esai Morales, Ona Grauer Diretor: Jason Bourque

programme.title: Tubarão De Malibu, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Em Malibu, um tsunami provoca o reaparecimento de uma espécie pré-histórica de tubarão, que se acreditava estar extinta e que se dedica a atacar os banhistas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Peta Wilson Diretor: David Lister

programme.title: Zumbis E Robôs, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Após um surto viral mortal, o soldado militar Max Gatling lidera um punhado de sobreviventes e um bando de robôs contra um exército de infectados. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Melanie Zanett, Matt Doran Diretor: Christopher Hatton

programme.title: Aranhas!, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Quando um experimento dá errado em um laboratório no meio do deserto, o local fica infestado de aranhas gigantes e ainda há pessoas presas lá dentro. Um grupo de operações de guerra chega para enfrentar o problema, mas não têm ideia do que enfrentarão ali Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Yu Rongguang, Su Youchen, Qin Liyang, Liu Weizhou, Li Xiaoai, Zhou Hengyuan Diretor: Li Yadong

programme.title: Maligna, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Mais perigosa que Hannibal Lecter, e ela só tem 9 anos... programme.title: Donnie Darko, (2002)

Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Jake Gyllenhaal, Jena Malone, Mary McDonnell Diretor: Richard Kelly

programme.title: Desastre das Cobras: O Ataque na Ilha das Cobras, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um grupo de funcionários da revista Geographic chega a uma ilha deserta no Sudeste Asiático para preparar um novo espetáculo. O líder da expedição esconde dos colegas que veio aqui para encontrar o pai, desaparecido há muitos anos. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Duby Zhang, Gong Xiao Jun, Li Kui, Yu Bo Lin, Zhuang Qi Qian Diretor: Ji Mi

programme.title: O Contágio, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Uma adolescente é contaminada por um zumbi, mas sua transformação demora seis meses para se completar. Mesmo assim, seu pai decide continuar ao seu lado enquanto ela deve se acostumar à sua nova personalidade monstruosa. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Abigail Breslin, Joely Richardson Diretor: Henry Hobson

programme.title: A Casa, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Um casal retira-se para uma casa luxuosa, de alta tecnologia e totalmente automatizada em uma ilha remota. O sistema de inteligência artificial da casa, inesperadamente, vira-se contra eles. programme.title: Ameaça no Espaço, (2020)

Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Cody Kearsley, Bruce Willis, Rachel Nichols Diretor: John Suits

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra uma jovem menina chamada Yakumo desenhando algo estranho. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU e os médicos ninja chegam para levá-la. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada - T01E203

programme.title: 2020. Os atacantes são membros da clã Kurama da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Naruto e os outros vão à vila para proteger Yakumo. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage - T01E205

programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Yakumo pôs Kurenai numa situação desesperada, e o terrível segredo da vila Kurama é revelado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.title: 2020. Gantetsu, um Ninja Renegado, pede que alguém o acompanhe para sair da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: 2020. Depois de evadir a emboscada dos Ninjas Renegados, Naruto, Gantetsu e Todoroki acabam num labirinto de floresta que confunde o senso de direção humana. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Desconcertante Floresta - T01E210

programme.title: 2020. O relacionamento entre Gantetsu e Todoroki é revelado, e a tensão entre os dois aumenta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordação Das Chamas - T01E211

programme.title: 2020. Depois de uma batalha intensa, Naruto consegue encurralar o inimigo, mas um menino é levado embora. O menino é Akio, o irmão mais novo de Todoroki e presumido morto por Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Para Cada Um Seu Próprio Caminho - T01E212

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra um jovem que está ferido e que perdeu a memória. Tsunade é cautelosa com a presença do menino, mas Naruto fica impressionado pela bondade do garoto e insiste que ele fique. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Lembranças Desaparecidas - T01E213

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade acredita que há uma conexão entre Menma e a Aldeia Escondida do Som. Naruto e os outros vão para o País dos Arrozais para dar uma olhada nas memórias de Menma. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Voltando À Realidade - T01E214

programme.title: 2020. Durante a batalha, Naruto descobre que Menma é um membro de uma gangue de bandidos que atacou sua aldeia. Chamado de traidor pelo líder da gangue, Menma revela seu maior segredo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Passado A Ser Apagado - T01E215

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade coloca Shikamaru numa missão para resolver o sequestro de Matsuri, uma candidata ninja da Aldeia da Areia, cometido pelos quatro celestiais. Os genins da Folha são chamados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Shukaku É O Alvo - T01E216

programme.title: 2020. Shino, Hinata e Neji procuram pelo inimigo enquanto Shikamaru espera pelo momento certo para atacar. A verdadeira intenção dos quatro celestiais é capturar Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: A Aliança Dos Shinobi Da Areia Com A Folha - T01E217

programme.title: 2020. Os oponentes de Gaara armam uma armadilha. Gaara acaba sendo preso pelo jutsu secreto Formação de Escala Reversa e sua areia é completamente selada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Areia Selada:O Contra-Ataque! - T01E218

programme.title: 2020. Gaara e Naruto encurralam Hoko, o último dos quatro celestiais, num vale. Eles descobrem que o objetivo deles era roubar o chacra de Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e assim ter o poder para desafiar as Cinco Grandes Nações. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Arma Renasce - T01E219

programme.title: 2020. Gaara se transforma em Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e obtém uma vitória impressionante. Depois da batalha, alguns descobrem novos caminhos para seguir, e Naruto decide ser ainda mais forte ao ir numa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Partida - T01E220

programme.title: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02

programme.title: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03

programme.title: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04

programme.title: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: 2020. Na aldeia com Tazuna, Sakura vê o sofrimento do povo no País das Ondas governado por Gato. Tazuna constrói uma ponte que dará acesso a outras terras para as pessoas não dependerem mais de Gato. Naruto e Sasuke treinam, usando chakra para subir em árvore. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu - T01E11

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12

programme.title: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14

programme.title: 2020. Vendo que não há tempo a perder, Kakashi decide usar o Sharingan mais uma vez para derrotar Zabuza. Mas Zabuza é um ninja experiente em batalhas mortais e, na primeira vez em que enfrentou o Sharingan, Zabuza conseguiu bolar uma estratégia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Visibilidade Zero: O Sharingan Desvendado - T01E15

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke são atacados dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku. Durante a batalha, Sasuke percebe o poder do seu próprio Sharingan e começa a desviar dos ataques de Haku. Haku decide acabar com ele. Sasuke usa seu corpo para proteger Naruto... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Selo Quebrado - T01E16

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente explode! Sua raiva por Haku libera o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. O chakra de Naruto está tão intenso que até Kakashi e Zabuza, que estão lutando à distância, percebem. Haku é incapaz de fazer algo diante do poder secreto de Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Passado Branco, Ambição Escondida - T01E17

programme.title: 2020. Haku pede a Naruto que acabe com ele. Naruto questiona a filosofia de Haku sobre existir apenas para lutar e ganhar. Enquanto isso, a batalha entre Kakashi e Zabuza chega ao clímax. Com a vitória ao alcance, Kakashi libera sua manobra mais devastadora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Armas Conhecidas Como Shinobi - T01E18

programme.title: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22
